name: Sunny Lemon Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fresh lemon juice (5 to 6 lemons)
1/2 cup fresh orange juice (1 large orange)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a pastry for two 9-inch pie crusts and prebake them for 5 minutes, then cool.
2. In a large bowl, slowly beat together the eggs, lemon juice, orange juice, sugar, heavy cream, vanilla extract, lemon zest, and salt until well combined but no bubbles or froth have formed.
3. Carefully pour the mixture into the baked pie shells.
4. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until the filling is deep golden on top.
5. Allow the pies to cool thoroughly on a rack before serving.
Makes 2 9-inch pies.
